title: AL's Creepers Revamped-Fa
description: This pack makes AL's Creepers Revamped compatible with Fresh Animations 1.10 by Fresh_LX!
body:
A pack that revamps Creepers and adds compatibility with **Fresh Animations 1.10** and adds more variants by changing the textures based on the biome grass colors! I made this as a more "Modernized-Vanilla style" pack while still giving them a well needed revamp.

Skins/Variants

***17 Creeper variants**

All skins/variants are biome dependent and, since I didn't use a custom model, it has built in compatibility with Fresh Animations!

Make sure that these are all set to "ON":

**Random Entities

Emissive Textures**

You can find these toggles by going into:

**Options>Video Settings>Quality**
